title: Tap of Exile
subtitle: Idle tactical RPG. Choose your class, build your skill tree, battle through 5 acts and conquer the endgame.
howToPlaySub: Get started in three simple steps — no download, no install.
step01Desc: Find @Tap_Of_Exile_Bot in Telegram and press Start. No download needed — runs right in Telegram.
step02Desc: Choose from Warrior, Samurai, Mage, or Archer — each with unique abilities, resistances, and playstyle.
step03Desc: Tap to deal damage, collect loot, allocate passive nodes, and conquer 5 acts and 10 endgame map tiers.
chooseLeagueSub: Two leagues, two experiences. Pick your battlefield.
standardDesc: The permanent league. Progress never resets — grow your character indefinitely and explore all content at your own pace.
monthlyDesc: A competitive fresh-start league that resets each month. Climb the leaderboard and fight for seasonal rewards.
whatAwaitsSub: Dozens of hours of content, deep mechanics, endless builds.
feat1Desc: Warrior, Samurai, Mage, Archer — each with distinct stats, abilities, and skill tree paths.
feat2Desc: From the Castle to The Depths. Fight through 50 unique locations with escalating challenges.
feat3Desc: 10-tier map system with 8 unique boss encounters. Three levels of boss keys for ultimate challenge.
feat4Desc: Build your character exactly how you want with a massive passive skill tree.
feat5Desc: 6 flask types, 4 quality tiers. Every kill has a chance to drop something useful.
feat6Desc: Compete in Dojo damage challenges and XP rankings. Rise to become a Champion.
communitySub: Chat with other players, share builds, report bugs, and stay up to date.
